Happy Hour with our latest cohort 🥂

Big thanks to our sponsor @longhorn_investments for helping make nights like this happen. 🤝

feed.title: How to make money with one skill
caps: Instagram · Facebook · TikTok

How to make money with one skill. 💰

Wholesaling is one of the most powerful strategies we teach inside the Roadmap because you do not need money, credit, or experience to get started.
You find the deal. You put it under contract. You sell that contract to an investor. You collect the fee.

One of my mentees made $50K doing exactly this.
No renovation. No mortgage. No risk. Just the skill of finding and evaluating a deal.

👉🏾 Comment INVESTOR and I'll DM you the link to book a free strategy call.

#realestateinvesting #wholesaling #dfwrealestate #mentorship
LinkedIn · YouTube
Same copy with 👉🏾 https://buff.ly/np3lEka link instead of the comment CTA.

feed.title: What makes Deba a great fit?
caps: Instagram

"What makes Deba a great fit?" 🎤 Our clients say it best.

From first-deal nerves to flipping houses — the right guide changes everything. 🏚️➡️🏡

Want that for yourself? Comment "Investor" 👇 to book a free 1-on-1 with Deba.
LinkedIn
"What makes Deba a great fit for you?" We asked our clients — their answers say more than we ever could. … Book a free 1-on-1 strategy call with Deba (link in post).

feed.title: The importance of getting started
caps: Instagram

The hardest part of real estate? Starting. 🏡

One buy & hold deal we broke down in class:
• Purchase: $340K
• Cash to close (15%): $51K
• Rent: $3,400/mo
• Cash flow: ~$350/mo

You don't need to be perfect — you need to begin. Comment "Investor" 👇 and Deba will send you a link to book your free 1-on-1 strategy call.
LinkedIn
Most people don't lose in real estate because they pick the wrong property. They lose because they never start. … Book a free 1-on-1 strategy call with Deba (Calendly link in post).

feed.title: I'm going to figure this out!
caps: Instagram

"I'm going to figure this out!" 💪🏾

That's the energy we want every mentee to bring to the mentorship. I was there too — grinding a 9-to-5 while taking care of my family. I figured it out, and I'll show you how.

Comment "Investor" 👇 to learn more and book a call with me.

feed.title:
CEO vs. Employee at 11AM, 3PM, and 7PM. 👀

Okay but real tal
caps: facebook

Real talk about what this life actually looks like. 🏡

This video started as a fun CEO vs. Employee comparison with Leanna, but I have to be honest: Leanna is absolutely incredible at her job. Don't let the video fool you.

What I want you to see is the full picture of what building a real estate business looks like from the inside.

My day started with journaling, scripture, and quiet time before the sun came up. By mid-morning I was walking houses and negotiating with wholesalers. By afternoon I was on the mentee call helping people run numbers and chase their first deal. By evening I was still analyzing properties while my kids were winding down for bed.

It's not glamorous every hour. There are alarms getting snoozed, fires getting escalated, and fast food runs between property walkthroughs.

But there are also deals getting under contract. Mentees getting unstuck. Lives changing, one house at a time.

If you've been watching from the sidelines and wondering if real estate investing is really for someone like you, it is. You just need a starting point and someone who's been exactly where you are.

Comment "INVESTOR" 👇 and let's talk about your next move.
instagram

CEO vs. Employee at 11AM, 3PM, and 7PM. 👀

Okay but real talk. Leanna is absolutely amazing at her job. This video just shows that we both bring different energy to the same mission.

Here's what a full day actually looks like behind the scenes:

Journaling and Bible time before the city wakes up. Walking houses, chasing wholesalers, putting deals under contract. Five fires put out before lunch. Mentee calls, title companies, partner check-ins, and kids' practice pickups all in the same afternoon. Still analyzing deals at 10PM.

Nobody tells you that building something real means your brain never fully clocks out. But I wouldn't trade it.

The freedom on the other side of that grind? Worth every alarm I snoozed and every cold protein shake.

If you're a W-2 worker wondering what it actually takes to build wealth through real estate, this is it. Messy, full, and purpose-driven.

Comment "INVESTOR" 👇 and let's map your first step.

#PrinciplesOfRealEstate #DebaDouglas #W2ToFreedom #RealEstateInvesting #BehindTheScenes #WealthBuilder #DallasRealEstate #RealEstateCoach #FixAndFlip #BuyAndHold
linkedin

What does a full day in real estate investing actually look like? Here's mine.

It starts before sunrise with journaling and intention-setting. By mid-morning I'm walking properties and negotiating with wholesalers. Afternoons bring mentee calls, partner check-ins, and a handful of problems to solve that nobody put on the calendar. Evenings? Still analyzing deals while the kids are winding down.

Our team member Leanna carries her own weight through all of it, and then some. The side-by-side comparison in this video is playful, but the truth underneath it is serious: building a real estate business takes sustained effort across every hour of the day.

Most people only see the properties and the closed deals. They don't see the five fires before lunch, the cold protein shake for dinner, or the late-night wholesaler calls that move the needle.

I share this not to impress you, but to be honest with you. If you're considering real estate investing and want to understand what the journey really looks like, I'd love to walk you through it.

Book a call and let's build your roadmap together.
https://calendly.com/bookdeba/road-map-real-estate-investing-property-review-clone-1

#RealEstateInvesting #PrinciplesOfRealEstate #W2ToFreedom #WealthBuilder
tiktok

CEO vs. Employee energy is NOT the same at 7PM. 😅

And before you come for Leanna, she is genuinely one of the best. This is just what building something real looks like.

My day: journaling at dawn, walking houses by noon, mentee calls in the afternoon, analyzing deals after the kids are in bed. Wholesalers, title companies, fires to put out, and still finding ways to get deals under contract.

Freedom doesn't mean easy. It means working for something that's actually yours.

If you're ready to start building, comment "INVESTOR" 👇

#PrinciplesOfRealEstate #RealEstateInvesting #W2ToFreedom #DebaDouglas #BehindTheScenes
youtube

A day in the life of a real estate investor looks nothing like the highlight reel. This video shows what actually happens from 11AM to 7PM, and far beyond, when you're building a real estate business from the ground up.

From early-morning journaling and Bible time to walking houses in the afternoon, running mentee calls, negotiating with wholesalers, and still analyzing deals after the kids are asleep, this is the full, unfiltered picture.

And yes, our incredible team member Leanna holds things down on her end too. The CEO vs. Employee comparison is all in good fun. What it really shows is two people, two roles, and one shared mission.

Principles of Real Estate exists to help W-2 workers take their first real step into investing. Not the perfect step. The first one. Whether it's a fix and flip, a buy and hold, or wholesaling your way to capital, the path forward starts with a single decision.

If you've been watching and wondering whether this is for you, it is. Let's sit down and build your personal roadmap together.

Book your strategy call here: https://calendly.com/bookdeba/road-map-real-estate-investing-property-review-clone-1
